articles.title: NMDC Steel jumps nearly 15% after firm swings into black in Q4 with Rs 392-crore net profit

articles.title: Inflation Blow: LPG Rates Increased in Delhi and Kolkata
articles.description: Consumers have received another inflation-related setback as the prices of commercial LPG cylinders have been increased in several cities across India. In Delhi, the price of a 19-kg commercial LPG cylinder has been raised by ₹42, taking the new rate to ₹3,113.50. Similarly, in Kolkata, the price has increased by ₹53.50, bringing the cost of a 19-kg commercial cylinder to ₹3,255.50. The price hike is expected to impact businesses that rely heavily on commercial LPG, including restaurants, hotels, and small enterprises. In addition, the cost of 5-kg free-trade LPG cylinders has also been increased by ₹11. Following the revision, the new price of a 5-kg free-trade LPG cylinder in Delhi stands at ₹821.50. The revised rates have come into effect immediately from today. However, there is some relief for households, as the prices of domestic LPG cylinders remain unchanged for now. The latest increase adds to concerns over rising costs and inflationary pressures affecting consumers and businesses alike.

articles.description: In a remarkable feat, Piyush Raj made history as Bihar's inaugural U20 Asian Athletics Championships medalist, clinching bronze in the thrilling men's 4x400m relay. Rising from previous setbacks, the 19-year-old sprinted with determination in the opening leg, finally realizing his dream of standing on an international podium. His next goal? Aiming for glory at the U20 World Athletics Championships.

articles.title: BJP doesn't back violence, says Gaurav Vallabh on Abhishek attack
articles.description: BJP's Gaurav Vallabh denies backing violence after TMC MP Abhishek Banerjee was attacked in Sonarpur. He claims TMC's own workers are rejecting leaders. Abhishek Banerjee has alleged the attack was 'BJP-sponsored'. Five people have been arrested.

articles.title: Spencer Leak Jr. Cause of Death: Chicago Icon Who Handled Rev. Jesse Jackson's Funeral Services Dies at 56
articles.description: Spencer Leak Jr., vice president of the historic Leak and Sons Funeral Homes in Chicago, has died at the age of 56. Leak Jr. was the third generation of a family whose funeral business dates back to 1933, handling more than 3,000 funerals annually in the Chicago area and playing a notable role in the Civil Rights movement.

articles.title: NATO claims new drone incident but officials find no proof: Putin catches west's lie about 'attack'?
articles.description: NATO is on edge after a fresh drone scare forced Germany to briefly shut down Munich Airport, its second‐busiest hub, just one day after a Russian‐made drone slammed into a residential building in Romania. The incident reignited fears about airspace security and the spillover of the Ukraine war deep into alliance territory. Is this the new normal for Europe’s skies — and how close is the alliance to a serious miscalculation?
